name: tradepilot-ai-scanner
description: TradePilot dashboard and safety layer powered by the QuantConnect LEAN event-driven engine for backtesting and Alpaca paper trading.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix lean-gateway
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix backend & npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.check: npm run check --prefix backend && npm run check --prefix frontend && npm run check:lean-gateway
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
